### Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.4.2 exposes configPath and stateDir metadata in Gateway connect success snapshots to non-admin authenticated clients. Non-admin clients can recover host-specific filesystem paths and deployment details, enabling host fingerprinting and facilitating chained attacks.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-r7p2-r9g4-4xph", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-04T21:55:19Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r7p2-r9g4-4xph", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-r7p2-r9g4-4xph"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-23T22:16:40Z", "published_at": "2026-04-24T00:31:51Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-2f7j-rp58-mr42", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41339", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/676b748056b5efca6f1255708e9dd9469edf5e2e", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-information-disclosure-via-gateway-connect-snapshot", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-r7p2-r9g4-4xph"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Gateway hello snapshots exposed host config and state paths to non-admin clients", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-04T21:55:20Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-r7p2-r9g4-4xph", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.2"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-04T21:55:19Z"}
